title: Record hard80 abs90k and handoff44 densify

# Hard80 Abs90 Handoff44 Contract

## Hard 80
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.80 so long sessions stop earlier before attention rot

## Abs 90k
absolute trigger tokens default to 90000 so large-context models reclaim sooner

## Handoff 44
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.44 so pre-swarm reclaim aligns with async pre-rot

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy vitest
